---
title: "CB3 Equity Report — Language Access Maps"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
import yaml
from shapely import wkt

PROJECT_DIR_CANDIDATE = Path.cwd()
for candidate in [PROJECT_DIR_CANDIDATE, *PROJECT_DIR_CANDIDATE.parents]:
    if (candidate / "src").exists() and (candidate / "data").exists():
        sys.path.insert(0, str(candidate))
        break

from src.map_utils import (
    build_metric_bubble_map,
    find_project_dir,
    format_metric_value,
)

PROJECT_DIR = find_project_dir()
CLEAN_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "clean" / "language.csv"
METADATA_PATH = PROJECT_DIR / "docs" / "metric_metadata.yml"
OUTPUT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "maps" / "language"
OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

LANGUAGE_METRICS = {
    "spanish_limited_english_household_share": {
        "title": "CB3 Language Access: Spanish LEP households",
    },
    "other_indo_european_limited_english_household_share": {
        "title": "CB3 Language Access: Other Indo-European LEP households",
    },
    "asian_pacific_limited_english_household_share": {
        "title": "CB3 Language Access: Asian/Pacific Island LEP households",
    },
    "other_languages_limited_english_household_share": {
        "title": "CB3 Language Access: Other-language LEP households",
    },
}

TOTAL_LANGUAGE_CONTEXT_METRICS = {
    "lep_household_share": ("Total LEP household share", "%"),
    "lep_households": ("Total LEP households", ""),
    "households_language_universe": ("Household language universe", ""),
}

EXCLUDED_DEMOGRAPHIC_METRICS = {"senior_poverty_rate"}
```

## Load metadata

```{python}
with open(METADATA_PATH, encoding="utf-8") as f:
    metadata = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}

missing_language_metadata = [
    metric for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS
    if metric not in metadata or not isinstance(metadata[metric], dict)
]
if missing_language_metadata:
    raise KeyError(
        "Missing language metric metadata in docs/metric_metadata.yml: "
        + ", ".join(missing_language_metadata)
    )

language_specs = {}
for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS:
    meta = metadata[metric].copy()
    language_specs[metric] = {
        **meta,
        "dimension": meta.get("dimension", meta.get("short_label", metric.replace("_", " ").title())),
        "label": meta.get("label", meta.get("short_label", metric.replace("_", " ").title())),
        "unit": meta.get("unit", "%"),
        "filename": meta.get("filename", f"{metric}.html"),
    }

demographic_keys = [
    metric
    for metric, meta in metadata.items()
    if isinstance(meta, dict)
    and meta.get("domain") == "demographics"
    and metric not in EXCLUDED_DEMOGRAPHIC_METRICS
]

demographic_specs = {}
for metric in demographic_keys:
    meta = metadata[metric].copy()
    if "palette" not in meta:
        continue
    demographic_specs[metric] = {
        **meta,
        "dimension": meta.get("dimension", meta.get("short_label", metric.replace("_", " ").title())),
        "label": meta.get("label", meta.get("short_label", metric.replace("_", " ").title())),
        "unit": meta.get("unit", ""),
    }

if not demographic_specs:
    raise ValueError("No demographic backdrop metrics found in docs/metric_metadata.yml.")

print("Language maps to render:")
for metric, spec in language_specs.items():
    print(f"  {metric} -> {spec['filename']}")

print("\nDemographic backdrop metrics:")
for metric in demographic_specs:
    print(f"  {metric}")
```

## Load prepared clean map file

```{python}
if not CLEAN_PATH.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"Could not find {CLEAN_PATH}. Run scripts/language/build.py first."
    )

clean = pd.read_csv(CLEAN_PATH, dtype={"GEOID": "string"}, low_memory=False)

required_columns = {
    "GEOID",
    "tract_label",
    "nta_name",
    "tract_centroid_latitude",
    "tract_centroid_longitude",
    "geometry_wkt",
}
missing_required = sorted(required_columns - set(clean.columns))
if missing_required:
    raise ValueError(
        "language.csv is not map-ready. Missing columns: "
        + ", ".join(missing_required)
        + ". Re-run scripts/language/build.py."
    )

clean["GEOID"] = clean["GEOID"].astype(str).str.extract(r"(\d+)")[0].str.zfill(11)
clean["geometry"] = clean["geometry_wkt"].map(wkt.loads)

tracts = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    clean.drop(columns=["geometry_wkt"]),
    geometry="geometry",
    crs="EPSG:4326",
)

numeric_columns = set(LANGUAGE_METRICS) | set(TOTAL_LANGUAGE_CONTEXT_METRICS) | set(demographic_specs)
for column in numeric_columns:
    if column in tracts.columns:
        tracts[column] = pd.to_numeric(tracts[column], errors="coerce")

available_language_specs = {
    metric: spec
    for metric, spec in language_specs.items()
    if metric in tracts.columns and tracts[metric].notna().any()
}

available_demographic_specs = {
    metric: spec
    for metric, spec in demographic_specs.items()
    if metric in tracts.columns and tracts[metric].notna().any()
}

assert len(tracts) == 31, f"Expected 31 CB3 tracts, got {len(tracts)}"
assert tracts["GEOID"].is_unique

if not available_language_specs:
    raise ValueError(
        "No language-group LEP household metrics are available in data/clean/language.csv."
    )

if not available_demographic_specs:
    raise ValueError(
        "No demographic backdrop columns are available in data/clean/language.csv. "
        "Make sure scripts/language/build.py merged a baseline file or that language.csv already contains demographics."
    )

print("Available language maps:")
for metric, spec in available_language_specs.items():
    print(f"  {metric}: {tracts[metric].notna().sum()} tracts -> {spec['filename']}")

print("\nAvailable demographic backdrops:")
for metric in available_demographic_specs:
    print(f"  {metric}: {tracts[metric].notna().sum()} tracts")
```

## Add total LEP household context to tooltip

```{python}
tooltip_fields = ["tract_label", "nta_name"]
tooltip_aliases = ["Census tract", "NTA"]

for source_column, (label, unit) in TOTAL_LANGUAGE_CONTEXT_METRICS.items():
    if source_column in tracts.columns and tracts[source_column].notna().any():
        display_column = f"{source_column}_display"
        tracts[display_column] = tracts[source_column].map(
            lambda value, unit=unit: format_metric_value(value, unit)
        )
        tooltip_fields.append(display_column)
        tooltip_aliases.append(label)
```

## Render separate Language Access maps

```{python}
rendered = {}

for metric, spec in available_language_specs.items():
    output_path = OUTPUT_DIR / spec["filename"]
    settings = LANGUAGE_METRICS[metric]

    map_object = build_metric_bubble_map(
        tracts=tracts,
        metric_specs={metric: spec},
        demographic_specs=available_demographic_specs,
        metric=metric,
        title=settings["title"],
        subtitle=(
            f"Bubbles: {spec['label']}. "
            "Background: selectable demographic layer. "
            "Tooltip includes total LEP household context where available."
        ),
        output_path=output_path,
        tooltip_fields=tooltip_fields,
        tooltip_aliases=tooltip_aliases,
    )

    rendered[metric] = {
        "map": map_object,
        "output_path": output_path,
    }
    print(f"Saved: {output_path.relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)}")
```

## Preview first rendered map

```{python}
first_metric = next(iter(rendered))
print(f"First rendered map: {first_metric}")
print(f"Open: {rendered[first_metric]['output_path'].relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)}")
```

## Validation summary

```{python}
summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "metric": metric,
            "label": available_language_specs[metric]["label"],
            "tracts_with_data": int(tracts[metric].notna().sum()),
            "output_html": details["output_path"].name,
            "output_exists": details["output_path"].exists(),
            "output_size_bytes": (
                details["output_path"].stat().st_size
                if details["output_path"].exists()
                else 0
            ),
        }
        for metric, details in rendered.items()
    ]
)

display(summary)

expected_outputs = {
    language_specs[metric]["filename"]
    for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS
    if metric in available_language_specs
}
actual_outputs = {
    details["output_path"].name
    for details in rendered.values()
}

missing_outputs = expected_outputs - actual_outputs
if missing_outputs:
    raise AssertionError(f"Missing expected Language map outputs: {sorted(missing_outputs)}")

for details in rendered.values():
    path = details["output_path"]
    assert path.exists(), path
    assert path.stat().st_size > 10_000, path

print("Output files:")
for details in rendered.values():
    print(f"  {details['output_path'].relative_to(PROJECT_DIR)}")
```
